name: CH32M030C8T7
description: Generated from the WCH CH32M030 parser pipeline for CH32M030C8T7 LQFP48. Includes synthesized routing extracted from Table 2-1 Pin definitions. CH32M030C8T7 is a CH32M030 MCU in a 48-pin LQFP48 package. This generated definition includes 17 peripheral blocks covering ADC with 20 input channels, 1 I2C bus, 2 QII decoder paths, 2 ISP current-sense front ends, 2 source current modules and 2 current sinks, 1 SPI bus, and 1 serial port. It also models the CH32M030 motor-control analog stack, including 4 op-amps and 3 comparators arranged into QII and ISP front ends. Package-specific high-voltage and gate-driver pins are exposed directly where they are bonded out.

peripherals.label: ADC
peripherals.description: Analog-to-digital converter with 20 analog input channels and a regular trigger input. Supports 2 pin-routing options.

peripherals.label: CMP2
peripherals.description: On-chip analog comparator with a positive input and a negative input.

peripherals.label: CMP3
peripherals.description: On-chip analog comparator with a positive input, a negative input, and a comparator output. Supports 4 pin-routing options.

peripherals.label: I2C1
peripherals.description: I2C bus controller with SCL and SDA signals. Supports 4 pin-routing options.

peripherals.label: ISINK1
peripherals.description: Programmable current sink output for voltage regulation and PPS-style control.

peripherals.label: ISINK2
peripherals.description: Programmable current sink output for voltage regulation and PPS-style control.

peripherals.label: ISOURCE1
peripherals.description: Programmable source current output for sensing and biasing applications.

peripherals.label: ISOURCE2
peripherals.description: Programmable source current output for sensing and biasing applications.

peripherals.label: ISP1
peripherals.description: Differential current-sense front end built from OPA3 and CMP2/CMP3 with a positive input and an optional negative input.

peripherals.label: ISP2
peripherals.description: Differential current-sense front end built from OPA4 and CMP3 with a positive input and an optional negative input.

peripherals.label: QII1
peripherals.description: AC small-signal decoder path built from OPA1 and CMP1 with a dedicated input pin and internal digital filtering.

peripherals.label: QII2
peripherals.description: AC small-signal decoder path built from OPA2 and CMP2 with a dedicated input pin and internal digital filtering.

peripherals.label: SPI1
peripherals.description: SPI controller with NSS, SCK, MISO, and MOSI signals. Supports 4 pin-routing options.

peripherals.label: TIM1
peripherals.description: TIM1 peripheral with 9 configurable signals. Supports 5 pin-routing options.

peripherals.label: TIM2
peripherals.description: TIM2 peripheral with 7 configurable signals. Supports 4 pin-routing options.

peripherals.label: TIM3
peripherals.description: TIM3 peripheral with 5 configurable signals. Supports 5 pin-routing options.

peripherals.label: UART1
peripherals.description: UART serial interface with TX, RX, CTS, and RTS signals. Supports 6 pin-routing options.
